title: Code every day (90 days)
goal: Ship a consistent daily coding habit for the next 3 months

habits.title: 20 focused minutes
habits.prompt: Open your project and code for at least 20 uninterrupted minutes. Tiny progress counts.
habits.notePrompt: What did you touch? One sentence.

habits.title: 30 focused minutes
habits.prompt: Code for 30 focused minutes on one concrete task. End by writing tomorrow's next step.

habits.title: Leave a trail
habits.prompt: Push a commit or open a PR / gist and paste the https link as evidence.

habits.title: 45 focused minutes
habits.prompt: 45 minutes of deep work. Prefer finishing something small over starting something big.
